name: Columbus (United States)

colors.symbolism: the central stripe, which bears the seal

description: Three vertical stripes — chrome yellow at the hoist, white in the centre, and scarlet at the fly — with the seal of the City of Columbus on the central white stripe.
history: Adopted by the Columbus City Council in 1929. The seal on the central stripe bears a half-wreath of green buckeye leaves and a half-circle of stars around a shield with the ships of Christopher Columbus's fleet, an eagle above, and a golden star for Ohio, the seventeenth state.

features.role: Seal of the City of Columbus
